$comment: SOURCE OF TRUTH for the order.created event. order-service is the only PUBLISHER. Any service may SUBSCRIBE. Never change a field here without bumping the version in $id and coordinating consumers.
title: order.created
description: Emitted by order-service immediately after an order is successfully persisted (i.e. after the userId passed validation against user-service).

version.$comment: Bump and fork the schema on any breaking change.

occurredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the order was created.
